pageContext.name: Ultimate Woody
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom are excited to present a life-size version of Woody from Disney's Toy Story!  This Woody figure stands at approximately 15.15' tall and comes with replaceable facial parts that have movable eyes so various facial expressions can be reproduced.  Disney fans don't miss your chance to add this Ultimate Woody Figure to your Disney collectibles display today!
